meta.name: Evidence
meta.description: This domain collects and stores symbolic representations of observations, data, or results used to confirm or refute hypotheses.
invariants: Evidence MUST align with reality, representing accurate observations.
All evidence MUST be auditable, tracking its creation, modification, and usage.
Evidence MUST NOT be subject to silent mutation; changes require explicit action.
The source or origin of evidence MUST be traceable (Provenance).
Evidence collection and interpretation MUST be explicit choices.
Evidence MUST maintain baseline integrity; preventing corruption or unauthorized alteration.
Deviations in evidence (e.g., unexpected data) MUST trigger drift detection mechanisms.
The system MUST respect the agency of the source of the evidence.
Evidence MUST be capable of confirming or refuting hypotheses (Testability, Falsifiability).
